title: Group Formation
description:
Use this link: Link to Sign Ups Links to an external site.

to access the Group Identification and Case Selection spreadsheet.

You receive 0 points for completing this, but will LOSE 5 points on EACH assignment (5) if you do not complete ALL 4 PARTS OF THIS SPREADSHEET by 9/15/25.

You will form 10 groups of 4 people each.  I recommend putting together a group with a range of skills and experiences.

You will choose 2 cases on which to submit a write up, and 1 cases on which to present.

You will also choose 2 cases for which you will do a review of the group presenting.

Each case will have specific questions to address (provided 2 weeks in advance), as well as a page LIMIT.

Presentations will be 20 minutes each, plus questions.
